nasb.text: Therefore take away the talent from him, and give it to the one who has the ten talents.’

esv.text: So take the talent from him and give it to him who has the ten talents.

cnv.text: 你們把他的六千銀幣拿去，交給那個有六萬的。

ccb.text: “主人接着说，‘收回他的一千银币，赏给那个有一万银币的奴仆。

csbs.text: “所以，你们把那一千两银子从他那里拿走，给那个有一万两的；
